title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Salarpuria Sattva

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Salarpuria Sattva
jsonLd.description:
Salarpuria Sattva has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Salarpuria Sattva:
Salarpuria Sattva is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salarpuria Sattva!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
